subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the divine Lote-Tree! In certain divine Tablets from the Most Exalted Pen, this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الجلیل من السدره الربانیه در بعضی از الواح الهی از قلم اعلی این
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @high station of the true believer, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
